text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh dear. Please forgive me, Trainer. I'm sorry
you had to see that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Truth be told, I happened upon a word puzzle at
the back of a magazine last night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't help myself, and set about solving
it. By the time I'd finished, though, the sun was
starting to rise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But I must say, there's nothing like getting into
bed with a real sense of accomplishment! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright didn't get enough
sleep...
